summary: The user sought assistance with meal planning after receiving high cholesterol test results during a doctor's appointment on Thursday at 10 AM. They decided to try the MyFitnessPal app for tracking their diet and requested healthy recipe ideas and meal prep tips to support their new dietary goals.
facts: The user received high cholesterol test results during a doctor's appointment at 10 AM last Thursday. The user plans to try the MyFitnessPal app to track their diet. The user spent the rest of Thursday researching healthy recipes and making a meal plan for the week. The user has a yoga class scheduled for Tuesday evening. The user has a few meetings scheduled at work on Tuesday and needs to finish a report due by the end of the week. The user wants to make a grocery list and do online shopping for healthy ingredients for their new meal plan. The user is focusing on meal prep to stick to their new meal plan and make healthy eating easier. The user is interested in healthy breakfast ideas to help lower cholesterol. The user is looking for tips on how to prep healthy meals in advance.
